text: Morning Jarvis, help me plan my day. What's on the calendar?
title: Morning Greeting

text: Morning Mike! Today is Saturday, February 08. No work meetings today. You have neighborhood BBQ at Dave's place and Ethan's soccer practice scheduled.
title: Jarvis Morning Briefing

text: Jarvis, Doing some cleaning around the house. I think the spark plug on the mower is dirty. Will work on this over the weekend.
title: Household Update

text: Automations are great when they work. I can look up a quick spark plug cleaning guide for your mower model. The automations are running now.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Jarvis, Listening to a podcast in the garage. It was a really interesting history episode. Just taking it easy tonight.
title: Personal Update

text: Got it, Mike. Personal time is valuable. History podcasts are great for garage time. I can suggest tech ones too. I've saved the reading stats.
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Jarvis, Played golf with Jake Morrison today. We are meeting Dave and Kim at a new restaurant. Looking forward to the weekend.
title: Social Update

text: Interesting. Catan is always a good time. Enjoy! I've set reservation alerts and mapped the route to Plano. Enjoy the craft beer!
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Ethan has soccer practice with Frisco FC today. Ethan's team played a match and won 2-1! It's a busy schedule but worth it.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: Got it, Mike. I've got the schedule covered. What a great win for Frisco FC! He's showing real growth on defense. I'll track the schedule.
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Quick update: Ethan and Lily are playing with Cooper in the backyard. She had a massive tantrum about brushing her teeth. Parenting is a constant learning process.
title: Parenting Update

text: Screen time is always a negotiation. Tantrums are tough at age 3. Turning brushing into a game or song might help. Rest well tonight.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Quick log: Putting together our grocery list. Grilling steaks and chicken on the deck tonight. It helps to plan ahead.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: Got it, Mike. I've got the grocery list ready. Perfect grilling weather! I've added hickory chips to the Costco list. Let me know how the recipe turns out.
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Just wanted to mention that the smart-home hub is acting up today. I think the spark plug on the mower is dirty. It is running much better now.
title: Household Update

text: Interesting. Automations are great when they work. I can look up a quick spark plug cleaning guide for your mower model. I can check local hardware store stock.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Reading a new book before bed. Trying to unwind after a stressful day. Ready to relax for the weekend.
title: Personal Update

text: Logged that. Good way to wrap up the day. Reading is a great way to disconnect. I've set a quiet sleep timer. Let me know if you need anything else.
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Quick log: Hosted a game night at our place. We played Catan and Dave Nguyen won at the end. Good to stay in touch with everyone.
title: Social Update

text: Sure thing! Catan is always a good time. Catan matches are always competitive. Dave must have rolled well. I can suggest more board games.
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Quick log: Ethan has soccer practice with Frisco FC today. Ethan is nervous about the soccer tournament in Plano. Always coordinate calendars for these.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: Logged that. Sounds exciting! Reassure him that practice is paying off. I've sent the game schedule to Sarah. I'll track the schedule.
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Jarvis, Lily refused to eat her dinner today. Ethan and Marcus Nguyen are playing in our backyard. Parenting is a constant learning process.
title: Parenting Update

text: Interesting. Toddlers are full of energy. Playdates are great for Ethan. I can add snack shopping to the Target list. I've updated the grocery list.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Planning our weekly meals today. We want to try a new vegetarian chili recipe. That should cover us for the week.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: Meal planning saves so much time. Great healthy option. I've added beans and canned tomatoes to the list. I've updated the shared shopping list.
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Quick journal entry for tonight. Relaxing Sunday spending time with Sarah and the kids. Barbecue went well and everyone liked the dinner. Had a great catch-up with the neighbors. Ready for sleep.
title: Evening Journal Entry

text: Journal logged, Mike. Rest well and I'll see you tomorrow.
title: Jarvis Journal Summary
